description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
- Improved Settings modal startup performance
- Improved storage information loading responsiveness
- Added temporary artwork folder size caching for faster Settings navigation
- Increased Skia GPU resource cache size for smoother album artwork rendering
- Added startup preloading for Songs, Albums, and Settings views
- Improved album detail loading performance with optimized track collection updates
- Deferred related album and artist sections for faster initial album page rendering
- Moved album artwork loading work off the UI thread
- Improved artist album lookup performance with indexed library queries
- Improved Settings library statistics calculation performance
- Added shared artwork caching across playback bar and album views
- Improved artwork loading consistency with unified decode sizes
- Reduced hover and press animation durations across the app
- Removed outline rings from accent-colored buttons where unnecessary
- Fixed active lyric line clipping on long lyrics
Full Changelog: v1.1.9...v1.1.10
